paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of July 22, 2026, with a change of -1.05% from the prior close and -24.28% over a window of 21 sessions. There has been 1 new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an article from PR Newswire on July 23, 2026, titled "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights". This article is related to the company's admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form on July 21, 2026, which discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form on July 15, 2026, which announces the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been 1 Form 4 filing.
